easter_eggs.server_down_desc: This is Joe our server. He tripped, fell, and dozed off. Please wait while we try to wake him up.
easter_eggs.same_info: Well, Well, Well... mommy’s little hacker wants to play programmer. Look at this genius who watched 5 minutes of BroCode videos and now thinks he’s a developer. Go clean your room or take out the trash — do something useful for once.
easter_eggs.quote:
— Will you do it?
— Yes.
— And at what cost?
— Everything.
easter_eggs.footer_note: Rules will be updated. If you don't like something -> alt + f4.
easter_eggs.preview_text_6: Tonight's the night. And it's gonna happen again and again. Has to happen
easter_eggs.preview_text_8: Wat dis bradar delet dis bradar, pak u bradar nekst komet.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.description: This is the time you spent actively using the site.

items.title: User data
items.text: This social network does not collect any personal data about users. It only collects your IP address, the browser you use, the operating system from which you logged in, and that's it.

items.title: Personal information
items.text: During registration, you may NOT provide real last name, first name, date of birth, gender, or country of residence. But also don't call yourself fjidfjid wkoreo who was born on February 31, 2090 BC.

items.title: Data storage
items.text: The social network operates on the principle: 'If a user deletes material, we must also delete it. If a user replaces material, we must also replace it, deleting the old material.'

items.title: Message confidentiality (updated 07.03.2026)
items.text: Your private messages are protected by encryption. We respect your privacy and do not read your chats. However, in the event of reports concerning the distribution of illegal materials or detection of a direct threat to life and safety (e.g., planning crimes, violence, exploitation, or terrorism), we have an obligation to provide this data to law enforcement agencies. We cooperate with authorities exclusively within the law: any requests for access to correspondence without proper legal justification will be categorically denied.

items.title: Message confidentiality (updated 27.03.2026)
items.text: Your private messages and media files are reliably protected using the AES-256-GCM standard cryptographic algorithm, which guarantees confidentiality and protection against data tampering. All message attachments are stored in closed storage without public access. We respect your privacy and do not analyze your daily chats. However, since encryption keys are generated and securely stored on our servers (Server-Side Encryption), our platform cannot be a tool for illegal activity. In the event of substantiated reports or detection of a threat (violence, exploitation, planning terrorism, child pornography), we have the technical ability to decrypt the data and provide it to law enforcement agencies. For security and prevention of concealing offenses, after a user deletes a message, it (along with attached files) is stored in a hidden form for 14 days before permanent physical destruction. Any requests from authorities are considered exclusively within the law and only upon presentation of an official court order and clear justification. P.S. Official platform stance: we fundamentally do not cooperate with jurisdictions whose legislation requires the implementation of backdoors, mass surveillance, or violation of the presumption of anonymity (in particular, certain initiatives of the United Kingdom). Moreover, we categorically do not process any requests, under any circumstances do not provide keys, and do not transfer data to state bodies or special services of the Russian Federation (FSB, RKN).

items.title: Content publication
items.text: The following is prohibited on the site:
subItems: AI-generated content (texts like: "#🇯🇵Japan is turning footsteps into electricity!" or AI-made videos that carry no meaning).
Fake information (if it's marked as a joke, it's fine).
Personal information belonging to another person (3 warnings).
Prohibited materials (if very serious, immediate account deletion without possibility of recovery).
